persona_name: Marcus — Returning User with Multiple Trips

bugs.title: SendMessage intermittent 'no response from AI' error
bugs.description: First attempt at planning mode Santorini itinerary request returned 'no response from AI — please try again' error after the AI had started generating text. The AI produced two textDelta events then emitted an error event. Retry succeeded. This may indicate a timeout or upstream AI provider issue.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: Send a planning mode message asking for a 3-day Santorini itinerary. The error occurred on first attempt but succeeded on retry.
bugs.expected: AI completes response with itinerary items
bugs.actual: Error: 'no response from AI — please try again' after partial text generation
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with CHAT_MODE_PLANNING content about Santorini

bugs.title: Chat history only shows planning messages, not selection mode messages
bugs.description: ListChatSessions for the Greece trip only returned the planning session (9ab5dba9). The initial selection mode message ('Hey, can we look at my Greece trip?') that triggered the trip match was not associated with the Greece trip's chat sessions. This may be by design (selection mode creates its own session not tied to a trip), but from a user perspective the selection context is lost.
bugs.expected: Selection mode messages that led to trip selection should be visible in the trip's chat history
bugs.actual: Only planning mode session (2 messages) visible; selection mode message not linked to trip

bugs.title: messageComplete fullContent is truncated/misleading on tool-loop responses
bugs.description: When the AI calls create_itinerary_items and then continues with a summary, the messageComplete fullContent only contains the second continuation text ('The itinerary items have already been added...'), not the full response including the detailed day-by-day summary the AI generated. The textDelta events contain the full content but the final fullContent field is incomplete.
bugs.expected: messageComplete.fullContent should contain the complete AI response text
bugs.actual: fullContent only contains the post-tool-loop continuation, missing the initial detailed summary

ux_issues.description: When switching trips via selection mode, the AI creates a new session each time. For a power user like Marcus who frequently switches between trips, this creates many orphaned selection sessions. A more streamlined trip-switching UX (e.g., a dedicated switch_trip tool or persistent selection session) would reduce friction.
ux_issues.suggestion: Consider a trip switching mechanism that doesn't require going through full selection mode each time

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The multi-trip workflow performed excellently. Vague reference matching ('my Greece trip' -> 'Greek Islands Hopping') worked perfectly on first try. Trip switching was seamless. The AI correctly distinguished between selecting existing trips and creating new ones. The Santorini itinerary was detailed and well-structured with 11 items across 3 days. Companion mode responses for Morocco were concise and relevant. The only friction was an intermittent AI error on first planning attempt and the need to use selection mode for trip switching.
